body.title: DickSimnel: creator-tier model in escalation chain
body.result: creator tier in _TIER_CASCADE + cascading escalation context; rules_engine.py has creator rules; 11 tests all green
body.intention: I intend that Dick's escalation chain has a creator tier between builder and master, so not every escalation burns master-tier tokens.
body.description:
Add a creator-tier model slot to Dick's escalation chain. When a builder-tier model escalates, the ticket goes to creator tier (e.g. qwen3-30b or similar larger OR model) with the escalation summary as context. Only if creator tier also escalates does it reach master tier (CC/Anthropic).

Escalation chain:
  builder (qwen3-coder-30b) → escalate with summary
  creator (larger OR model)  → starts from summary; escalates with cumulative summary if needed
  master  (anthropic/claude) → starts from cumulative summary

Each tier adds its own escalation summary to the chain. Master sees everything that was tried.

**Affected files:** devices/dicksimnel/device.py, devices/inference/rules_engine.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite
**Scope boundary:** IN — creator tier rule, cascading summary accumulation. OUT — Granny role routing (T-granny-tier-cascade), CC's advisor() function.
**Completion criteria:** An escalated ticket reaching master tier has a cumulative escalation note with builder + creator attempts. rules_engine.py has a named creator-tier rule. Integration test: mock escalation chain produces expected summary structure.
